name: Klimasan Klima Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Klimasan Klima Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells refrigeration products worldwide. The company offers beverage and beer coolers, ice cream cabinets, supermarket cabinets, freezers, and wine coolers under the Metalfrio, Klimasan, Senocak, Caravell, and Derby brands. Klimasan Klima Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1915 and is based in Manisa, Turkey.
